expectedDelta: Replace the two-document roadmap/backlog source model with `devflow/roadmap.json` as the only editable roadmap machine truth.
Render `devflow/ROADMAP.md` as the primary human roadmap view from `roadmap.json`.
Generate a deprecated `BACKLOG.md` projection for one compatibility release while preventing it from being the preferred input truth.
Render Mermaid technical architecture diagrams from `roadmap.json` architecture nodes and edges.
Preserve legacy `roadmap-tracking.json` and markdown fallback migration paths without losing RM queue, ready handoff, or parked fields.
Update public skill contracts, templates, examples, docs, generated Codex mirrors, and validation tests to the new roadmap truth model.
affectedInvariants: Roadmap state has one editable machine truth source.
Generated Markdown projections do not become independent durable truth.
Legacy downstream projects can migrate from `roadmap-tracking.json` without a hard break.
Distributed `.claude` skills and generated `.codex` mirrors stay in sync through adapter checks.
gapsClosed: `ROADMAP.md`, `BACKLOG.md`, and `roadmap-tracking.json` currently duplicate roadmap and backlog state.
Architecture diagrams are currently template text rather than data-driven generated output.
Example validation currently requires `BACKLOG.md` as a first-class roadmap artifact.
newGaps: A later breaking cleanup should remove deprecated `BACKLOG.md` output after downstream compatibility evidence is collected.
notes: No `devflow/specs/` capability tree exists in this repo yet; this planning package records capability truth through change-meta and public skill contracts.
The user approved the unified roadmap state path during office-hours before this cc-plan run.
